title: Chaetochloa onurus
taxonomy: Chaetochloa onurus is classified as a species of grass within the family Poaceae. The genus Chaetochloa belongs to the subfamily Chloridoideae. Further, the species is placed in the tribe Cynodonteae, which is a group of grasses commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Chaetochloa onurus is based on morphological and molecular characteristics. This grass species is native to certain parts of the Americas and Africa.
